info.name: Zoom Meeting API
info.description:
The Zoom Meeting API lets developers access meeting data from the Zoom platform. Use this API to create, read, update, and delete meetings, manage participants, registrants, polls, and live streams. Build private services or public applications on the Zoom App Marketplace.

Contact Support:
 Name: Zoom Developer Support
 Email: developer-support@zoom.us

query.description: The type of meeting. `scheduled` - All valid previous (unexpired) meetings, live meetings, and upcoming scheduled meetings. `live` - All the ongoing meetings. `upcoming` - All upcoming meetings including live meetings. `upcoming_meetings` - All upcoming meetings including live meetings. `previous_meetings` - All the previous meetings.
The number of records returned per API call. Maximum is 300.
The next page token to paginate through large result sets. A next_page_token is returned in the response when a result set exceeds the page_size.
The page number of the current results.

variable.description: (Required) The user ID or email address. Use `me` for the current user in user-level apps.

request.description: List all the meetings that were scheduled for a user. For user-level apps, pass the `me` value instead of the userId parameter.

response.name: Successfully retrieved the list of meetings.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

The number of records returned per API call. Maximum is 300.
The next page token to paginate through large result sets. A next_page_token is returned in the response when a result set exceeds the page_size.
The page number of the current results.

The number of records returned per API call. Maximum is 300.

variable.description: (Required) The user ID or email address. Use `me` for the current user in user-level apps.

request.description: Create a meeting for a user. For user-level apps, pass the `me` value instead of the userId parameter. A meeting can be scheduled, instant, or recurring.

response.name: Meeting created successfully.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Zoom Get a Meeting's Join Token for Live Streaming

variable.description: (Required) The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

request.description: Get a meeting's join token to allow live streaming. The join token allows a recording bot or live streaming service to join the meeting.

response.name: Successfully retrieved join token.

variable.description: (Required) The meeting ID. This can be the meeting number (e.g., 85746065) or the meeting UUID.

request.description: Retrieve the details of a meeting. This returns detailed information about the specified meeting including settings, recurrence, and tracking fields.

response.name: Successfully retrieved meeting details.
